reviews.text:
Kim and Kyle are our dear friends, so writing a professional review for them is such a huge honor. For the sake of this review, I’m going to think about our wedding photography experience from a purely professional stance and try to leave out how, as friends, these two are warm, kind, funny, and so caring.

Kim and Kyle helped me and my now-husband Andrew plan our shots before they happened. We had a really great phone call and mapped out all of the little moments we wanted to remember—there isn’t ONE moment that we asked for that they didn’t photograph.

On the day of the wedding, they arrived on time and with big smiles. They slid right into the day, quietly capturing candid moments and gently directing us so we could have the shots we wanted. Kim and Kyle not only took some of the best wedding photos I’ve ever seen, but they were so lovely with every person they interacted with. No amount of stress, rain, or anything else ruffled them—in fact, I think one of the main reasons the day went so well was because they were very much helping to drive the bus. The shots they’ve sent us have me in happy tears—little details, big moments, gorgeous group shots, and so many moments that I am happy to never forget.

It looks like I didn’t need to separate out how, in friendship, these two are so incredible! Who they are as people is very important to the work they’ll do for YOU on your big day. They understand what a big day is it, and they can empathize with everyone there, especially the bride and groom. Trust me when I tell you that there is no one more qualified and no one more kind than Kyle and Kim.

10/5 stars.

Kim and Kyle are super friendly and easy to work with. Kim has a beautiful eye for color juxtaposition, with a focus on detail that results in stunning pictures that felt incredibly easy and natural to shoot. My boyfriend and I had never done a professional shoot before and didn't know what to expect - and Kim and Kyle made the entire experience into a true adventure by venturing into the high country to go from autumn to winter, drone and Landy included!

10/10 would recommend for any event (their wedding work is absolutely beautiful), special moment, or just because. Personally, this duo has a unique ability to capture raw beauty in their work and the quality of their images speak for themselves.

Kim has always done my photos so it was a no brainer to use her for our wedding and engagements. She has a good eye for great landscape and locations for photos. she makes the process easy so you don't forget everything. Kim and Kyle always deliver and exceed expectations. They do a wonderful job at getting to know the people they're working with and delivering a product that has your name all over it. They make things relaxed, keep the schedule going on time and are great at working the crowd and keeping things professional. If I could give any advice, it would be to never "cheap out" on a photographer. You get what you pay for! You can't go wrong with Kim and Kyle!

I used Kim for my wedding in September. To say that my pictures are gorgeous and everything I had ever dreamed of is truly an understatement. She was great to deal with during the planning stages. On the day of, Kim was prompt and professional. She was fun to work with and made everyone feel very comfortable. She was great at picking out locations and finding unique shots. She also was wonderful at the candid shots. These ended up being some of my favorite photos! I had originally picked Kim because I wanted my horses to be a special part of my day. The photos with my husband and our horses are beautiful and a wonderful treasure. I highly recommend Kim and hope to work with her again in the future!

Kim and Kyle are the perfect pair to have at your side to capture all the special moments on your wedding day, and as an added bonus, ease your nerves and be your hype squad! Each photo we received made us look fabulous and cemented the joy in our friend's and families' faces for years to come. Our wedding was in indoors, and with cloudy skies and rain, and photos in each setting looked amazing. I couldn't be more happy that we booked them...you need to!
